$comment: Product registry — single source of truth for the autonomous dev org. Consumed by dwight-launch-from-issue.py (repo resolution), the org-owner cron (backlog health), and TM issue routing. Add a product here and every lane knows it.

products.name: AutoTrade
products.description: Self-improving agentic paper-trading desk + trader_intel web app
products.notes: Trading logic changes flow as rule_proposals (human-gated); web/app code via normal PR lane.

products.name: ResiLife (EWAG iOS)
products.description: Multifamily wellness amenity iOS app — EWAG's product

repos.note: clone PENDING — mac lacks non-interactive GitHub auth (deploy key needed)

verify: ssh mac-dev: xcodebuild -scheme ResiLife -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 15' build
products.notes: Runner containers (lidi-task-manager-ewag-agent-*) handle branch/PR scaffolding; codegen goes through the gateway codex lane.

products.name: MONTRA
products.description: Montra Dev Console (web) — lives inside lidi-solutions
verify: ssh mac-dev: cd ~/repos/MONTRA && xcodebuild -scheme MONTRA -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' build
web console: cd /home/aaron/repos/lidi-solutions && npm run build
products.notes: iOS app repo found 2026-07-03: EWAG-dev/MONTRA on the mac node.

products.name: AutoTap / OpenClaw QA
products.description: Autonomous iOS QA: simulator capture harness + macOS app + orchestration engine
products.notes: This is the org's QA arm — every iOS product's verification gate once wired.

products.name: CleaningRobot
products.description: Apartment cleaning robot: firmware + vision + (future) embedded agent

repos.note: linux checkout at /home/aaron/CleaningRobot; LIVE dev happens on the orin

products.notes: RobotFirmware + Vision subdirs. Related research repos: Dockerized_GroundingSAM, OrbSlam, tracking-dataset. Embedded-agent runtime design TBD.

products.name: LIDI Task Manager
products.description: The org's work queue (CF Worker + D1 at tm.lidisolutions.ai)
products.notes: Dwight is sole maintainer per workspace contract.
